name: 8p23_1_defensin_inverted_SD
description: 8p23.1 inverted segmental duplication block containing the beta-defensin gene cluster (DEFB1, DEFB4, DEFA1A3, SPAG11) and OR7 olfactory receptor paralogs. The inverted SD pair on 8p drives the common 4-5 Mb 8p23.1 polymorphic inversion and recurrent microdeletion/duplication CNVs.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~1.5 Mb SD blocks in inverted orientation (REPP/REPD) at ~99% identity, flanking GATA4, NEIL2, FDFT1; contains DEFB cluster with population-level copy-number variation (typical diploid copy 4-12) and OR cluster.
